data.title: Arc is a stablecoin-focused blockchain created by Circle, the issuer of USDC, as a new Layer-1 protocol.
data.description: Circle, the issuer of USDC, has introduced Arc, a new Layer-1 blockchain. This blockchain is tailored for stablecoin-native finance solutions.

data.title: C4 Therapeutics reports Cemsidomide Phase 1 data at International Myeloma Society meeting: 50% ORR at 100 µg dose, 40% at 75 µg dose. Promising results for multiple myeloma treatment.
data.description: In a study on heavily pre-treated relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma patients, combining cemsidomide with dexamethasone showed promising results. The highest dose level of 100 µg yielded a 50% overall response rate (ORR), while the 75 µg dose level achieved a 40% ORR. This indicates the potential efficacy of this combination therapy in treating this challenging patient population.

data.title: Investors with losses to contact Hagens Berman by Sept. 26th deadline in securities class action against Lockheed Martin (LMT) - PRNewswire
data.description: Investors who have incurred losses are urged to reach out to Hagens Berman before the September 26, 2025 deadline in a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit is targeting Lockheed Martin Corporation (NYSE: LMT) on behalf of investors who have suffered financial damages.

data.title: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check is investigating potential securities law violations for Fortinet Inc. investors (NASDAQ: FTNT).
data.description: A legal investigation is underway by the law firm Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check LLP in Radnor, Pennsylvania, for possible breaches of federal securities laws involving investors of Fortinet, Inc. (NASDAQ: FTNT). The investigation, initiated on September 20, 2025, is in response to events on August 6, 2025, related to Fortinet. Interested parties can find more information at www.ktmc.com.

data.title: Global Can Coatings Market projected to reach $3.44 billion by 2030, as per MarketsandMarkets™ report.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on September 20, 2025, a report on the global can coatings market was released. The market, segmented by type into epoxy, acrylic, polyester, and other types, as well as by application into food cans, beverage cans, aerosol cans, and other applications, is projected to grow. The forecast extends to 2030, predicting significant expansion in the industry. This indicates a positive outlook for the can coatings market in the coming years, with substantial growth expected across regions worldwide.

data.title: Yiwugo.com capitalizing on toy sales, world's biggest commodity market. "Toys" lead platform's popular categories ranking.
data.description: In YIWU, China as of September 20, 2025, Yiwugo.com, the official website representing the Yiwu Commodity Market, has been identified as the world's largest commodity wholesale market. Statistics obtained from Yiwugo indicate that the "toys" category has claimed the leading position in the platform's "Popular Market Categories" list for a considerable period.

data.title: Triazine market predicted to reach $381.4 million by 2030 - MarketsandMarkets™ report.
data.description: On September 20, 2025, in Delray Beach, Florida, a report was released regarding the Triazine Market. The report covers various types of triazines including Water Soluble, Oil Soluble, and Gas Phase, as well as products such as MEA Triazine and MMA Triazine. It focuses on their usage in different industries like Crude Oil, Natural Gas, Geothermal Energy, and Industrial Processes. The report offers a global forecast for the market, considering factors such as regional variations and industry demand. The study highlights the significance of triazines in sectors requiring chemical solutions, with a particular emphasis on the increasing adoption of these products worldwide.

data.title: Bitcoin expert predicts a 70% chance BTC hits $100K floor on Sept 21, historically leading to gains above 50%.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently priced at around $115,000 with traders closely watching September 21, a significant date that could impact the future trajectory of the leading cryptocurrency through the end of 2025. Network economist Timothy Peterson has labeled September 21 as "Bitcoin Bottom Day," noting that historically, Bitcoin tends to end the year on a higher note around 70% of the time after this date, typically seeing a median gain of over 50%. Exceptions to this trend were observed only in 2018 and 2022, times of severe bear markets which do not align with the current market cycle. Factoring in present market conditions, Peterson suggests there is a 90% likelihood of upward movement and close to a 100% chance of BTC being traded...

data.title: Transition to Web3 hinges on incorporating Web2's resources, not discarding them. Integrating gradually boosts trust and adoption.
data.description: To ensure the widespread adoption of Web3, it is crucial to incorporate existing Web2 infrastructure instead of completely replacing it. This gradual integration approach will help establish trust and speed up mainstream acceptance of Web3 technologies. By incorporating the foundations of Web2, such as established systems and networks, the transition to Web3 can be smoother and more widely accepted by the general public. This strategy is essential for Web3 to gain traction and reach a larger audience, overcoming barriers to entry and fostering a more inclusive digital environment. Embracing Web2 infrastructure is key to driving the mass adoption of Web3 technologies in the digital realm.

data.title: The RevoluGROUP Proxy Shareholder Group Demands Action: Stop Asset Stripping, Illegitimate Directors, Audit Deception, and Delisting Threat and Restore Governance
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on September 20, 2025, the RevoluGROUP Proxy Shareholder Group (listed on TSX-V as REVO, on Frankfurt Exchange as IJA2, and on Munich Exchange as A2PU92) has announced its representation of more than 10% of the total shares of RevoluGROUP Canada Inc. traded on TSXV (REVO). This release comes in direct reaction to the current developments...

data.title: LISEN releases four power banks for the iPhone 17 Series, addressing portable charging needs.
data.description: The iPhone 17 Series was officially launched in New York on September 20, 2025. The new ultra-thin design of the phone has kicked off a trend of portable use. However, this has also raised concerns about selecting the appropriate charging device and finding a balance between convenience and efficiency in different situations. The series introduces several new features and enhancements, along with 13...

data.title: Crypto treasuries with a long-term plan can withstand any market, says Hashkey Capital CEO; strategic reserves are key for sustainability.
data.description: Deng Chao, CEO of HashKey Capital, emphasized the importance of considering cryptocurrency treasuries as strategic reserves rather than speculative investments to ensure sustainability during turbulent market cycles.

data.title: Spotify and Nvidia lead 5 stocks near buy points as market rally hits record highs.
data.description: Last week, amidst a market rally that surged to record highs, Spotify and Nvidia emerged as frontrunners among five stocks nearing buy points. This positive development highlights the promising performance of these companies within the current market conditions.

data.title: MT Højgaard Danmark wins tender to build two metro stations in Nordhavn, Copenhagen for M4 line.
data.description: MT Højgaard Danmark, a business under MT Højgaard Holding, has been successful in securing Metroselskabet’s tender for the construction of two new metro stations along the M4 line in the outskirts of Nordhavn, Copenhagen. This project involves the planning, development, and construction of the stations, indicating a significant achievement for the company.

data.title: Wall Street takes note of data center boom as a tech market health indicator and warns of A.I. bubble risk.
data.description: The amount of available space in data centers has become a key indicator of the tech industry's well-being and the potential for an artificial intelligence (A.I.) bubble. This metric serves as a measure of the demand for digital storage and processing capabilities in the market, with a full capacity signaling a strong tech sector and a looming risk of an A.I. bubble.

data.title: 2025 CICE opened in Qingdao with 300 exhibitors from 17 countries. Aiming to empower the future through AI.
data.description: In Qingdao, China, on September 20, 2025, the 2025 China International Consumer Electronics Exposition (CICE) began at the Qingdao International Convention and Exhibition Center (Hongdao Hall). The expo attracted more than 300 exhibitors representing 17 countries and regions, showcasing the latest innovations and technologies in consumer electronics.

data.title: Nanjing Jiangbei New Area seeks global talents for scientific and industrial innovation on September 20, 2025.
data.description: In Nanjing, China, on September 20, 2025, a diverse group of individuals including Nobel laureates, academicians, young scientists, and emerging R&D professionals convened along the Yangtze River to discuss the fusion of scientific and industrial innovation. The gathering attracted participants from various nations to deliberate on strategies for enhancing collaboration in the field.

data.title: Huawei showcases 30 global benchmarks for digital transformation in data communication at HUAWEI CONNECT 2025.
data.description: In September 20, 2025, in Shanghai, Huawei CONNECT 2025 showcased over 30 global benchmark examples for digital and intelligent transformation in data communication. These displays were the result of collaboration between Huawei and industry leaders, presenting the latest innovations and proven industry advancements.

data.title: Tezos (XTZ) at $0.75 tests support, showing mixed signals. Key levels pending reversal. More details inside.
data.description: The price of XTZ is currently at $0.75, showing a bearish trend, but technical indicators indicate a possible reversal in the near future. It is crucial to monitor the key support and resistance levels for potential market movements.

data.title: H World expands presence in Southeast Asia with 3 new JI Hotels in Kuala Lumpur and Phnom Penh, marking debut in Malaysia.
data.description: On September 20, 2025, H World Group Limited, a prominent global hospitality company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol HTHT and on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange as 01179, revealed the agreement for three additional JI Hotels located in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia and Phnom Penh, Cambodia. This significant development signifies H World's initial presence in Malaysia and also expands its portfolio...
